# ctyun_redis_backup (Resource)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10029420/10142282



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}


resource "ctyun_redis_backup" "test" {
  instance_id = "425c9173f98b4646a72ce0b986af00b0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) 实例ID

### Optional

- `ip_type` (String) 获取备份文件下载链接的输入参数：网络类型，可选值：publicIp(公网IP)、privateIp(私网IP)，默认为privateIp 支持更新
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID，如果不填则默认使用provider ctyun中的region_id或环境变量中的CTYUN_REGION_ID
- `remark` (String) 备注信息，不超过128个字符

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) 创建时间，为UTC格式
- `download_urls` (Map of String) 备份文件下载链接，key为Redis节点名，value为备份文件下载URL
- `id` (String) 资源唯一标识符
- `name` (String) 备份名，格式为YYYYMMDDHHMMSS
- `status` (String) 节点状态: success(成功), processing(进行中), fail(失败)
- `type` (Number) 备份类型: 0(手动备份), 1(自动备份)
